name: mission-control-texas-in-space
description: Mission Control: Texas in Space — Unit 7 Texas History game (TEKS 7.12C, 7.19A/C/E, 7.7E). Play a young flight controller at NASA's Johnson Space Center, working one full mission from console prep to splashdown (solo, one class-wide group) — over a server-authoritative Socket.IO backend with a live Teacher Command Center reporting one class-wide accuracy group.
comment: No npm workspaces: this drive is exFAT, which cannot host the symlinks/junctions workspace linking requires. server/ and client/ install independently; `npm install` here cascades via postinstall.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server --no-fund --no-audit && npm install --prefix client --no-fund --no-audit
